message:
fix(ci): Use bash shell for find command on Windows

- Add shell: bash to debug step to fix PowerShell compatibility
- Fixes '/dev/null' path error on Windows runners

files.patch:
@@ -117,6 +117,7 @@ jobs:
           MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET: '10.13'
 
       - name: Find built .node files (debug)
+        shell: bash
         working-directory: packages/agentic-jujutsu
         run: |
           echo "=== Searching for .node files ==="
